---
title: "Programme"
---

## 29 September 2026

| Time | Session |
|---|---|
| 09:30–10:00 | Registration |
| 10:00–10:10 | Opening remarks |
| 10:10–10:40 | **Dr. Alessandro Bonetti** <br> Therapeutic discovery and industry perspectives |
| 10:40–11:10 | **Dr. Mikhail Kabeshov** <br> Therapeutic discovery and industry perspectives |
| 11:10–11:40 | Coffee break |
| 11:40–12:10 | **Fabio Bove + Marco Ferrarini** <br> AI-driven therapeutic discovery |
| 12:10–12:40 | **Dr. Gabriele Corso** <br> Generative models and biological design |
| 12:40–13:10 | **Dr. Esther Wershof** <br> Machine learning for cell-state biology |
| 13:10–14:10 | Lunch |
| 14:10–14:40 | **Dr. Fabian Frohlich** <br> Disease modelling and cellular systems |
| 14:40–15:10 | **Prof. Michail Mamalakis** <br> Multimodal learning for biomedical discovery |
| 15:10–15:40 | **Dr. Tiansi Dong** <br> Foundation models and representation learning |
| 15:40–16:10 | Coffee break |
| 16:10–16:40 | **Dr. Larry Melidis** <br> Computational biology and therapeutic discovery |
| 16:40–17:10 | **Dr. Anurag Limdi** <br> Machine learning for molecular and biomedical data |
| 17:10–17:40 | **Prof. Tom McClelland** <br> AI, reasoning and biological systems |
| 17:40–18:00 | General discussion / wrap-up |

## 30 September 2026

| Time | Session |
|---|---|
| 09:30–09:50 | **Dr. Johann Hawe** <br> Machine learning for biomedical data |
| 09:50–10:10 | **Dr. Ilaria Billato** <br> Single-cell and multimodal data analysis |
| 10:10–10:30 | **Dr. Bianca Pierattini** <br> Cell-state modelling and biological regulation |
| 10:30–11:00 | Coffee break |
| 11:00–11:20 | **Dr. Tania Bobbo** <br> Computational biology and disease mechanisms |
| 11:20–11:40 | **Dr. Davide Rigoni** <br> Omics data analysis and biological modelling |
| 11:40–12:00 | **Flavio Sartori** <br> Machine learning for therapeutic discovery |
| 12:00–13:00 | Lunch |
| 13:00–13:20 | **Massimiliano Coretti** <br> Emerging research talk |
| 13:20–13:40 | **Andrea Giuseppe di Francesco** <br> Emerging research talk |
| 13:40–14:00 | **David Miller** <br> Emerging research talk |
| 14:00–14:20 | **Salvo Romano** <br> Emerging research talk |
| 14:20–14:50 | Coffee break |
| 14:50–15:10 | **Andrea Rubbi** <br> Emerging research talk |
| 15:10–15:30 | **Wageesha Widuranga** <br> Emerging research talk |
| 15:30–16:00 | Discussion: future directions in generative models for therapeutic discovery |
| 16:00–16:15 | Closing remarks |
